statement: Retry behavior — No blind complex retry system. User should have a clear retry path — Affects save error state and manual save action.
affected_modules: src/services/builder.service.ts; src/services/versions.service.ts; autosave hooks; src/utils/export.helpers.ts; src/utils/import.helpers.ts; local cache
ux_impact: User sees the problem and can retry intentionally.
